subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Your detailed letter, which you had penned in Beirut, was received and carefully perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه مفصل که در بیروت مرقوم نموده بودید رسید و بدقت ملاحظه
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @education of children; moral education, @Hands of the Cause, @consultation
